title: acer italum var. tauricola
intro: Acer italum var. tauricola, also known as the Korean maple, is a specific variety of the maple tree that belongs to the family Sapindaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Korea and China, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Acer italum var. tauricola include reducing inflammation and pain, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark and leaves are typically used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
